name: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Startup Shortcut Created
notes: This building block detects when a service creates a shortcut under Windows startup folder.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: Startup Shortcut Created on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Created, Audit.Object Access Attempt, Audit.Object Access Success
when the event matches LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES ('.*\\start menu\\programs\\startup') AND LOWER("File Extension") MATCHES ('lnk') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BB:BehaviorDefinition: Startup Shortcut Created on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Created, Audit.Object Access Attempt, Audit.Object Access Success
AND when the event matches LOWER("File Directory") MATCHES ('.*\\start menu\\programs\\startup')  AND LOWER("File Extension") MATCHES ('lnk') AQL filter query
